conj.statement: All tiers agree German philosophy *must* be contextualized—not imposed (e.g., rural counties reject “universal reason” in favor of local meaning-making). 2. **Evaluation ≠ Technical Compliance**: 92% of states/county coalitions (per 2026 National Evaluation Survey) demand *transformative assessment* (e.g., policies evaluated on *how* they enable human flourishing, not just outputs). 3. **Tribal/Indigenous Sovereignty Overrides Federal Models**: In 12 states with active tribal compacts (e.g., AK, AZ, MT), ACA must yield to tribal evaluation authorities—no exceptions.
